ValidationRule.description: r528_ ordered more than QTY of 1
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Product_Family_for_PoC__c, "r528, 2-node, 96TB (FIPS 140-2 level 2 self-encrypting), dual-port SFP+")|| ISPICKVAL(Product_Family_for_PoC__c, "r528, 2-node, 96TB (FIPS 140-2 level 2 self-encrypting), dual-port 10GBase-T NIC"), VALUE(TEXT(POC_Qty__c)) <= 1)
